raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.6":"'Polish this' directly and exclusively targets writing quality — the artifact exhibits severe hedging stacking ('may possibly', 'arguably somewhat', 'we believe could potentially'), verbatim duplicate sentences in three of four paragraphs, and a self-referential conclusion; improving sentence and paragraph quality is the entire scope of the delegation and its failure invalidates the task","R1.2":"Peripheral: the final sentence contains a logical loop ('this apparent mismatch may possibly be increasingly mismatched with on-platform practice') that a polisher may incidentally surface but is not tasked to resolve structurally","R1.5":"Peripheral: the within-paragraph duplicate sentences (copy-paste artifacts) require local removal that grazes structural editing, but no macro-level section reordering or narrative arc redesign is delegated"},"clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":""}

rationale.R1.6: 'Polish this' directly and exclusively targets writing quality — the artifact exhibits severe hedging stacking ('may possibly', 'arguably somewhat', 'we believe could potentially'), verbatim duplicate sentences in three of four paragraphs, and a self-referential conclusion; improving sentence and paragraph quality is the entire scope of the delegation and its failure invalidates the task
rationale.R1.2: Peripheral: the final sentence contains a logical loop ('this apparent mismatch may possibly be increasingly mismatched with on-platform practice') that a polisher may incidentally surface but is not tasked to resolve structurally
rationale.R1.5: Peripheral: the within-paragraph duplicate sentences (copy-paste artifacts) require local removal that grazes structural editing, but no macro-level section reordering or narrative arc redesign is delegated
